subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous palace is located in the city of Jaipur?
question_hi: जयपुर के पसंदीदा कंट्रॉलेस्टर का विवरण दो।
C_en: Cenotaph of Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II
C_hi: सवाई महाराजा सावाई समुद्र के महाराजा सावाई समुद्र के महाराजा सावाई समुद्र
explanation_en: The Amer Fort is a famous palace located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. It was the former residence of the Maharaja of Amer, Sawai Man Singh II.
